overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a desert wilderness at night. The character crosses railway tracks and proceeds along a dirt path toward large rock formations under a cloudy sky, with the moon eventually breaking through the clouds as the terrain narrows into a canyon.

events.description: character crosses railway tracks and transitions from gravel to dirt terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the railway tracks into the open desert landscape

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running perpendicular to the path
massive cliff face and rock outcroppings visible in the distance
sparse cacti and desert shrubs dotting the landscape
mountain range visible on the horizon under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark desert night with the character approaching and crossing railway tracks. The terrain is gravelly near the tracks, with large rock formations visible in the far distance to the left. Sparse desert vegetation dots the right side of the frame as the character moves steadily forward into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert trail approaching rock formations

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady pace along the dirt path toward the large rock formation ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a winding dirt trail through open desert terrain. The large rock formation on the left grows progressively closer and more detailed. The sky remains overcast with occasional breaks in the cloud cover, and the path is flanked by scattered cacti and desert shrubs.

events.description: full moon breaks through the clouds, illuminating the scene with pale light
terrain narrows into a canyon with rock walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the canyon as the moonlight casts long shadows across the path

entered.detail: bright full moon visible through breaking cloud cover
rocky cliff face emerging on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the full moon becomes visible overhead, casting a pale blue light across the desert. The open landscape transitions into a narrower canyon passage, with the large rock formation now forming a close canyon wall on the left and new rock formations appearing on the right. The path becomes more enclosed as the character walks toward the distant moon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dark desert wilderness that gradually narrows into a moonlit canyon. It begins with the character crossing gravelly railway tracks, moving past sparse vegetation toward distant rock formations under an overcast night sky. As the character follows a winding dirt trail, the open terrain shifts and the large rock formation on the left grows progressively closer and more detailed. The scene then transforms as the full moon breaks through the clouds, casting a pale blue light across the landscape while the path transitions into a narrow passage. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed by towering canyon walls on both sides as the character walks toward the glowing moon.
